title: github.com/broadinstitute/warp/scANVI
author: broadinstitute
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Pipeline for cell type label transfer on Multiome data using SCVI and SCANVI models. Integrates single-cell RNA (GEX) and ATAC data with an annotated reference to transfer cell type labels via semi-supervised deep generative models.
steps_raw: Pipeline for cell type label transfer on Multiome data using SCVI and SCANVI models. Integrates single-cell RNA (GEX) and ATAC data with an annotated reference to transfer cell type labels via semi-supervised deep generative models.
